headline: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) Renews Partnership With Travel + Leisure Co.
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the best information technology services stocks to buy now.. On January 28, Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) renewed its partnership with Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL). The company did not reveal the total worth of the deal; however, it highlighted that the renewal is a multi-million-dollar strategic […]

headline: Companies Stare Down $100,000 Fee With New H-1B Visa Rules
summary: It’s the biggest revamp in decades, and employers, lawyers and staffing firms are studying how to get the best chance at winning one of the 85,000 coveted slots that will be awarded at the end of March.  “This is going to be a bit of a sea change,” said Peter Bendor-Samuel, the executive chairman of global research firm Everest Group, which works with companies that routinely use the H-1B program.
